app.title: smashegg
app.tagline: Online Guandan matches, playable straight from your browser.
app.updateAvailable: A new version is available. Reload to update — your game will be right where you left it.
hello.heading: Connectivity check
hello.alarmPending: Alarm timer running, waiting to fire...
locale.label: Language
home.createFailed: Could not create the room. Please try again.
home.invalidCode: Invalid room code: it should be 6 letters or digits.
room.notFound: Room not found. Please check the code.
room.loadFailed: Could not load the room. Please try again.
error.notSeated: Take a seat first to change the settings
error.startFailed: Couldn't start the game — check the rules and timing
error.notLobby: The game has already started, so this can't be changed
error.notPlaying: That action isn't available right now
error.notEnoughSeats: Everyone needs a seat before the game can start
error.invalidName: That nickname can't be used — try another
error.seatTaken: Someone just took that seat — pick another
error.protocol: Connection hiccup — please refresh the page
error.generic: That didn't go through — please try again
room.spectating: You have no seat here, so there is no game view to show.
lobby.heading: Lobby
lobby.copyFailed: Could not copy — please copy the address bar link.
lobby.startNeedSeat: Take a seat to start the game.
lobby.nameHint: Type a name, then take a seat below.
lobby.configNeedSeat: Take a seat to change the rules and timing
lobby.configPlaceholder: Rule options are coming soon; the defaults apply for now.
lobby.waitingForSeats: {count} open seat(s) left — the game can start once every seat is taken.
lobby.rules.firstLeadMethod.label: First lead of the match
lobby.rules.firstLeadMethod.hint: How the first hand's leader is decided.
lobby.rules.firstLeadMethod.drawCard.hin: Cards are flipped from the deck at the table to decide who leads the first hand — everyone watches the draw.
lobby.rules.firstLeadMethod.random.label: Random first leader
lobby.rules.firstLeadMethod.random.hint: The system picks the first leader at random, with no opening ceremony.
lobby.rules.aFailConsequence.label: Handling a failed A attempt
lobby.rules.aFailConsequence.hint: What happens next when a team fails to clear level Ace.
lobby.rules.aFailConsequence.suspend.hin: Play this hand at the opponents' level, then try Ace again later.
lobby.rules.aFailConsequence.demote.hint: Drop back to a lower level and climb again.
lobby.rules.aFailConsequence.none.label: No penalty
lobby.rules.aFailConsequence.none.hint: Stay at Ace and try again next hand.
lobby.rules.overshootWinsGame.label: Overshooting Ace wins the match
lobby.rules.overshootWinsGame.hint: A team already at Ace wins the whole match on its next level-up, without playing another hand.
lobby.rules.returnTributeMaxRank.label: Return-tribute card limit
lobby.rules.returnTributeMaxRank.hint: Limits which cards may be paid back as return tribute.
lobby.rules.returnTributeMaxRank.max10.h: The returned card must rank 10 or below.
lobby.rules.returnTributeMaxRank.unlimit: Any card may be returned, except the one just received.
lobby.rules.cardCountVisibility.label: Hand-size visibility
lobby.rules.cardCountVisibility.hint: Controls when other players can see how many cards you're holding.
lobby.rules.cardCountVisibility.always.h: Everyone can see every player's card count at all times.
lobby.rules.cardCountVisibility.onReques: The count stays hidden until a player is down to 10 cards or fewer.
lobby.rules.jokerBombSupreme.label: Joker bomb is the highest play
lobby.rules.jokerBombSupreme.hint: Both big and small jokers together beat every other bomb in the game.
lobby.timing.label: Turn timers
lobby.timing.hint: How long each decision may take. Locked once the match starts.
lobby.timing.preset.standard.label: Standard
lobby.timing.preset.standard.hint: 90s to plan a new hand, 45s per turn
lobby.timing.preset.relaxed.label: Relaxed
lobby.timing.preset.fast.label: Fast
lobby.timing.preset.untimed.label: No timer
lobby.timing.preset.untimed.hint: No limit while connected; a disconnected player is played for after 60s
lobby.timing.legacyHint: This room uses the built-in default timers
game.action.noMatch: Selected cards don't form a playable combination
game.action.cannotBeat: Can't beat this — you can only pass
game.action.canBeat: You have a card that beats this
game.card.label: {rank} of {suit}
game.hand.label: Your hand
game.sort.label: Sort hand
game.rail.title: Level ladder
game.rail.suspended: Ace attempts exhausted — this hand plays at the opponents' level
game.tribute.selectHint: Pick a highlighted card, then confirm
game.chooser.title: Declare the combination
game.ceremony.title: Card draw for first lead
game.cut.waiting: Waiting for {name} to cut the deck
game.cut.prompt: Choose where to cut — the deck splits here
game.ceremony.count: Count card {value} — the count lands on {name}
game.cut.flipped: Flipped {card} — jokers and the wild (heart level card) do not count. Cut again.
game.cut.flippedWaiting: {name} flipped an uncountable card — cutting again
game.feed.cutFlipped: {name} flipped an uncountable card and cuts again
game.ceremony.markerIdentity: This card is tucked back into the deck — whoever draws it leads.
game.result.title: Match result
game.feed.label: Game log
game.feed.antiTribute: Tribute resisted — no tribute this hand
game.error.wrongPhase: That action doesn't fit the current phase
game.error.cardsNotInHand: Those cards aren't in your hand
game.error.cannotBeatTop: That doesn't beat the current play
game.error.tributeCardNotEligible: That card isn't eligible for tribute
theme.lacquer.name: Classic lacquer
theme.label: Deck
theme.cinnabarCourt.name: Cinnabar Court
game.deal.label: Dealing
game.interlude.title: Hand over
game.interlude.aSuspended: Ace attempts exhausted — {team} is suspended and plays at the opponents' level
game.interlude.suspendedNote: {team} suspended — this hand plays at the opponents' level
